title: Loa model-config.yaml v3
description: cycle-109 Sprint 1 v3 schema (FR-1.1, IMP-008). Extends v2 ADDITIVELY with capability-aware per-model fields: effective_input_ceiling, reasoning_class, recommended_for, failure_modes_observed, ceiling_calibration (source + timestamps + staleness), streaming_recovery (first-token deadline + empty-detection + cot-budget per FR-4.4). Per SDD §3.1.3, v3 MUST accept all valid v2 documents with schema_version bumped to 3. Conservative defaults policy at SDD §3.1.2 (min(50% × api_context_window, 30000) for effective_input_ceiling, reasoning_class default false with opt-in list, recommended_for allow-all default).

schema_version.description: Locked to integer 3 in cycle-109 Sprint 1. v2 docs go through tools/migrate-model-config.py --to v3 first.

_archived_v1_fields.description: v1 archive namespace (preserved from v2 migrator).

_archived_v2_fields.description: v2 archive namespace populated by v2→v3 migrator when fields are renamed or removed in v3.

_unknown_v1_fields.description: v1 unknown-key namespace (preserved from v2 migrator).

_unknown_v2_fields.description: v2 unknown-key namespace populated by v2→v3 migrator for keys not recognized in v3.

providerEntry.description: v3 provider entry — additive extension of v2. Operator extensions still flow through .loa.config.yaml::model_aliases_extra rather than schema growth.

modelEntry.description: v3 model entry — extends v2 modelEntry with capability-aware fields per SDD §3.1.1. All v3 additions are OPTIONAL at the schema layer; the migrator populates conservative defaults per SDD §3.1.2.

streaming_max_input_tokens.description: Carried forward from v2 (cycle-103 Sprint 3 T3.4).

legacy_max_input_tokens.description: Carried forward from v2 (cycle-103 Sprint 3 T3.4).

kind.description: Carried forward from v2 (cycle-104 Sprint 2 T2.11). Adapter routing discriminant: 'http' (default — calls the provider HTTP API) vs 'cli' (subprocess to claude-headless / codex-headless / gemini-headless for zero-API-key CLI-subscription environments). The cheval._CLI_ADAPTER_BY_PROVIDER map dispatches kind:cli entries to the per-provider CLI adapter.

_archived_v2_fields.description: Per-model archive namespace populated by v2→v3 migrator.

effective_input_ceiling.description: cycle-109 FR-1.1: empirically-validated safe input-size ceiling per SDD §3.1.1. Cheval pre-flight gate emits typed exit 7 (ContextTooLarge) when estimated_input > this value. Conservative default per SDD §3.1.2: min(50% × api_context_window, 30000).

reasoning_class.description: cycle-109 FR-1.1: reasoning-class model flag (extended-thinking / o-series / equivalent). Default false; opt-in flip for claude-opus-4.x, gpt-5.5-pro, gemini-3.1-pro per SDD §3.1.2.

recommended_for.description: cycle-109 FR-1.1 + SKP-004 v5 closure: per-model role allow-list. Migration default per SDD §3.1.4 = allow-all [review, audit, implementation, dissent, arbiter]. KF-auto-link (FR-1.5) is the explicit reducer. Empty list `[]` is the operator kill-switch (substrate emits exit 11 NoEligibleAdapter at lookup per SDD §3.1.4).

failure_modes_observed.description: cycle-109 FR-1.1: KF-ledger references that have flagged this model. Populated automatically by FR-1.5 KF-auto-link on every CI run that touches known-failures.md. Pattern enforces `KF-NNN` shape.

ceilingCalibration.description: cycle-109 FR-1.1 + IMP-007: how the effective_input_ceiling was determined + staleness tracking. SDD §3.1.1 schema. Cheval consults this to emit ceiling_stale: true to MODELINV envelope when stale_after_days elapsed.

source.description: How the ceiling value was determined. empirical_probe is the gold standard (per FR-1.6 5×5 binary-search protocol); conservative_default falls back to SDD §3.1.2 formula.

calibrated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last calibration. Cheval compares against now() + stale_after_days for staleness detection. null when source=conservative_default (no probe has run; staleness check evaluates non-stale per SDD §3.1.2).

sample_size.description: Number of probe runs that informed the ceiling. null when source != empirical_probe.

stale_after_days.description: Days after calibrated_at when ceiling is considered stale. Cheval emits ceiling_stale warning to MODELINV envelope past this threshold and routes through chunked path defensively (FR-4).

reprobe_trigger.description: Human-readable description of conditions that should re-fire the probe (e.g., 'first KF entry referencing model OR 30d elapsed OR operator-forced').

streamingRecovery.description: cycle-109 FR-4.4: streaming-with-recovery thresholds per model. SDD §3.1.1 + §3.1.2 default policy. Distinct from effective_input_ceiling (which is the preemptive gate); these are the runtime recovery knobs once dispatch has started.

first_token_deadline_seconds.description: Time-to-first-token before stream is considered hung. Default 30s for non-reasoning, 60s for reasoning_class (per SDD §3.1.2).

empty_detection_window_tokens.description: Number of tokens to read before declaring 'empty content' (KF-002/003 detector). Default 200 per SDD §3.1.2.

cot_token_budget.description: Reasoning-class-only: chain-of-thought token allowance before treating subsequent silence as empty-content. Default 500 for reasoning_class; null for non-reasoning. Per FR-4.4.

permissionsBlock.description: Carried forward from v2 DD-1 Option B per-model permissions block.

not.description: An agent binding may have `model:` OR `default_tier:` but not both. Carried forward from v2.
